description: The 38th Street Gang is an American criminal street gang in Los Angeles, California, composed mainly of Mexican-Americans. Founded in the 1920s, it is one of the oldest street gangs in Los Angeles and is controlled by the Mexican Mafia. The gang engages in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, extortion, and other criminal activities. It gained notoriety during the 1942 Sleepy Lagoon murder trial and the subsequent Zoot Suit Riots.
